虽说是重生文带了个类似于空间戒指的异能，但是作者写的却都是末日下人性，对异能描述不多，不喜欢重生系统文的可以看看，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685727400,"group_id":"7206341486365903887","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N190+1F4liw1LRZdZziXxC4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4443b5451b7740548ec3a151a07a0d19~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794546&x-signature=YLucJb5MB2ZtuV5NCEsPHRQUAR8%3D","user_id":"598590990591704","user_name":"死亡是凉爽的午夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"598590990591704","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7206341486365903887","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+疯狂囤货+黑化复仇+基建狂魔+热血）
天灾降临，适者生存。
全球沦陷，人类死亡率高达98%……
末日之下满目疮痍，文明消失道德沦丧。
上一世，周辰惨遭毒手，暴尸荒野。
重生归来，他觉醒了空间疯狂囤货，手握天灾密码活个精彩。
“疯了吧？邻居都饿死了你还在吃肉？”

5705922~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393430&x-signature=ZCuW6LvfZ5skpDSbQZ2l0XmI%2Fic%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3602386550","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.05449183e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303571034B91414C1DF95A7BCB5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":140,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":105448,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":84381},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7269282221474628408","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我非常喜欢这本书，情节循序渐进、人物形象塑造得很好、内容真实，喜欢末世文的可以看看这本书。不少人都说前面直接劝退人！我想的是不管多么优秀的书都会多多少少有一些缺点。这本书也是有一些，熬着把前面小区的章节看完就行，实在熬不住就跳过。后面的章节都是循序渐进，情节过得虽然有点慢但是这样才符合书的本质，如果情节过得太快我反而觉得没什么看点。该说的我都说了，怎么想都是看各位书友的想法。作者加油[送心][送心][顶帖][顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692511780,"group_id":"7206341486365903887","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2507307135542543"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7206341486365903887","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.7687518e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":67687,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7243712209380885283","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书完全可以胜任五星 ，但是我只给四星。没有为什么，书很好，没有像其他末世文那样败笔，内容、情节、人物都描绘得很真实。其他末世文不是丧尸就是收女人，那样感觉很毒也很让人反感。我比较喜欢这种大自然崩溃的末世文，看过的书不少，末世文也挺喜欢看，但是找不到好一点的书。这本书就很不错，对于不喜欢丧尸文的我来说就是非常好。书有一点点毒，但可以忽略不计，作者女大大一天两更虽然有点少，但是身体最重要，希望作者女大大坚持下去，后面不要烂尾就行[赞][赞][赞][顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686558292,"group_id":"7206341486365903887","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"往事已烟消云散
